channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 12.5%.

item.title:
Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: New Survation poll of Makerfield has Burnham 10 points up.
LAB: 49% (+6) REF: 39% (-1) RTR: 8% (+1) GRN: 2% (-1) LDEM: 1% (-3) CON: 1% (-1)
item.description:
New Survation poll of Makerfield has Burnham 10 points up.
LAB: 49% (+6) REF: 39% (-1) RTR: 8% (+1) GRN: 2% (-1) LDEM: 1% (-3) CON: 1% (-1)

item.title: Reuters: Labour mayor Burnham signals he would run in leadership contest against UK's Starmer - Reuters
item.description: Labour mayor Burnham signals he would run in leadership contest against UK's Starmer - Reuters

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Probe into Mandelson and Andrew may last over a year, top prosecutor says
item.description: Probe into Mandelson and Andrew may last over a year, top prosecutor says

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Makerfield by-election debate live: Burnham suggests religious knife laws should be reviewed after Henry Nowak death
item.description: Makerfield by-election debate live: Burnham suggests religious knife laws should be reviewed after Henry Nowak death

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Keir Starmer hits out at Elon Musk for ‘trying to whip up division’ in UK over Henry Nowak’s murder
item.description: Keir Starmer hits out at Elon Musk for ‘trying to whip up division’ in UK over Henry Nowak’s murder

item.title: BBC Politics: Burnham says he would seek to enter any Labour leadership contest
item.description: Burnham says he would seek to enter any Labour leadership contest

item.title: BBC Politics: Labour failing to learn from Tories over leadership change calls, says Kyle
item.description: Labour failing to learn from Tories over leadership change calls, says Kyle

item.title: ITVX: Andy Burnham confirms he would run in race to replace Keir Starmer - ITVX
item.description: Andy Burnham confirms he would run in race to replace Keir Starmer - ITVX

item.title: Bloomberg.com: Andy Burnham Confirms He’ll Challenge Starmer for UK Premiership - Bloomberg.com
item.description: Andy Burnham Confirms He’ll Challenge Starmer for UK Premiership - Bloomberg.com

item.title: The Guardian: Business secretary attacks ‘entitlement’ of Starmer leadership rivals - The Guardian
item.description: Business secretary attacks ‘entitlement’ of Starmer leadership rivals - The Guardian
